productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual Blue Leatherette Shoe
description: Composition:The shoe has a rubber sole and synthetic upper PU.Shoe care:Use a soft clean cloth to wipe away dust. Do not machine wash. Fitting:Regular.These navy blue numero uno sneakers with bold panels in different textures and bold  embroidered logo create a confident statement that is at once subtle but sure. These shoes bring classic appeal to any outfit so wear them next time you hang out with friends at the mall or go to the movies.
